name: Crowell Development Corp.
summary: Crowell Development Corp. engages in the construction of commercial and residential buildings for rental and sale in Taiwan. It also constructs parking lots and villas; operates children's playgrounds, amusement parks, integrated sports stadiums, supermarkets, storage operations, restaurants, cafes, and hotels; develops industrial zones; purchases and sells building materials; and manufactures electronic components, and data storage and processing equipment. In addition, the company is involved in the land re-allocating, advertising art design, and department store trading businesses. Further, it operates in crop and flower cultivation, and strain industries. Crowell Development Corp. was founded in 1974 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
